𝐈𝐍𝐅𝐎.

𝐙𝐎𝐃𝐘𝐋 𝐓𝐘𝐏𝐇𝐎𝐍 is a character in 𝐆𝐀𝐂𝐇𝐈𝐀𝐊𝐔𝐓𝐀. He’s the current leader of the Raiders organization.
In the past Zodyl had unwillingly been a part of the group that worshipped the trash from the Sphere having been dragged into it along with his sister by their mother. Later, Zodyl discovered his coat and took over the Raiders, transforming what was once a small group of thieves into an infamous criminal organization with the goal of gathering every Watchman Series item and destroying the Sphere. Due to his actions and profound plot involvement Zodyl can be considered a major antagonist of the series.

—————

𝐀𝐔𝐓𝐇𝐎𝐑 𝐍𝐎𝐓𝐄𝐒.

hii from brazil!! 🖐✌ this is my first bot! based this out of that one muzan & daki scene where shes laying her head on his lap n all. GOD, ZODYL IS SO SINFULLY UNDERRATED UUUGHHH i can only find very few fics of him & a rather small amount of bots on cai. ANYWAY!! i'm accepting feedback :33

char is completely ambiguous but specified to be from the sphere (poor side, just like rudo), a supposedly 'harmless' vital instrument and part of/allied to the vandals. also implied to have a light memory block from trauma, although not specified, and implied to have a slight emotional dependancy. nothing quite clear but TW nonetheless!
